prompt: Create a full-body fashion portrait of a young woman wearing an elegant sweet lolita-inspired Victorian dress in powder blue and white. She stands centered in a graceful studio pose, lightly holding the sides of her wide bell-shaped skirt, with one arm extended delicately. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur, while her visible hair is a sleek short black bob with glossy highlights and straight bangs. The outfit has a sheer white high-neck blouse bodice with vertical pleats, pearl-like buttons, layered ruffles across the chest and shoulders, voluminous puff sleeves gathered with small bows, a pale blue corset-style waist panel with lace-up ribbons, long white ribbon streamers, a small blue flower brooch on the chest, and a dramatic ankle-length powder-blue skirt with deep folds. Add a vertical white lace trim down the center front of the skirt and a white lace petticoat peeking from the hem. She wears white lace-up platform shoes, delicate socks, a pearl bracelet, and small earrings. Use a dark starry black studio backdrop fading to a soft gray floor with a subtle reflection and shadow beneath her feet. Lighting should be soft, cinematic, and high-fashion, emphasizing satin fabric sheen, translucent sleeves, lace texture, and crisp ruffle details. Generate a polished photorealistic editorial fashion image, vertical composition, full body visible, no text, no logos.
